title: Fabricator

moves.title: Fabricate
effects: Spawn a defensive bot (Guardbot or Noisebot)
Spawn an aggressive bot (Zapbot or Stabbot)

moves.title: Fabricating Strike
effects: Spawn an aggressive bot (Zapbot or Stabbot)

move_pattern: Each turn checks if the Fabricator has fewer than 4 alive allies. If so, randomly chooses between Fabricate and Fabricating Strike (equal weight). If 4 or more allies are alive, uses Disintegrate instead. After every move, the condition is re-evaluated.
notes: The Fabricator spawns minions with MinionPower applied. Fabricate spawns one defensive bot (Guardbot or Noisebot) and one aggressive bot (Zapbot or Stabbot). Fabricating Strike spawns only one aggressive bot (Zapbot or Stabbot). Bot spawning avoids repeating the same type as the last bot spawned. Once 4 or more allies are alive, the Fabricator switches entirely to Disintegrate until allies die.
